title: Earthworks and Excavation
reference: DPWH-style earthwork provisions, approved geotechnical report, drawings, and special provisions.

clauses.scope: Perform excavation, backfilling, grading, hauling, disposal of unsuitable material, moisture conditioning, and compaction required to complete the earthwork shown on the plans.
submittals: Excavation and shoring method statement where required
Laboratory test results for fill materials
Compaction and field density test plan
materials: Approved suitable backfill and selected fill material free of organic matter and deleterious substances
Water for moisture conditioning
execution: Set out excavation limits and protect nearby structures and utilities
Excavate to the required lines and grades
Dispose of unsuitable material in approved areas
Place backfill in controlled layers and compact each lift to required density
testing: Laboratory soil classification and compaction tests when required
clauses.measurement: Measure by cubic meter or by pay item shown in the BOQ, based on approved limits and sections.
clauses.payment: Payment shall include excavation, hauling, disposal, backfilling, compaction, testing, labor, equipment, and all incidentals.
special_notes: Review groundwater control and temporary shoring requirements where deep excavation is involved.

title: Structural Concrete
reference: DPWH-style structural concrete provisions, approved structural plans, mix design, and applicable code references.

clauses.scope: Furnish, batch, transport, place, consolidate, finish, cure, and protect structural concrete for footings, columns, beams, slabs, walls, and similar members.
references: Applicable code provisions for reinforced concrete
submittals: Source of cement, aggregates, and admixtures
materials: Portland cement
Fine and coarse aggregates suitable for structural concrete
Clean water
Approved admixtures when permitted
execution: Place concrete only after formwork, reinforcement, embedded items, and clearances are approved
Avoid segregation during transport and placement
Compact using mechanical vibrators
Provide proper finishing and curing
Protect freshly placed concrete from disturbance and early loading
testing: Inspection of clear cover, embedded items, and pour condition
clauses.measurement: Measure by cubic meter or by the BOQ pay item.
clauses.payment: Payment shall include materials, batching, delivery, placement, vibration, finishing, curing, testing, labor, tools, and incidentals.
special_notes: Include construction joints, waterstops, or non-shrink grout only when shown on plans or special provisions.

title: Reinforcing Steel
reference: DPWH-style reinforcing steel provisions and approved structural details.
preferred_phrases: fabrication and installation of reinforcing bars

clauses.scope: Provide cutting, bending, fabrication, placement, tying, securing, and protection of reinforcing steel complete in place.
references: Applicable code requirements for development length and splicing
materials: Deformed bars of specified grade and size
Tie wire, chairs, spacers, and accessories
execution: Cut and bend bars accurately
Maintain proper spacing, lapping, anchorage, and cover
Keep bars free from substances that impair bond
Secure reinforcement against displacement during concreting
testing: Physical verification of bar size and spacing
Laboratory test when required by project specifications
clauses.measurement: Measure by kilogram, ton, or BOQ pay item.
clauses.payment: Payment shall include procurement, cutting, bending, placing, tying, supports, labor, and incidentals.
special_notes: Welding of reinforcement shall not be permitted unless specifically allowed and detailed.

title: Formworks and Falseworks
reference: DPWH-style provisions for formworks, shoring, and falseworks.

clauses.scope: Provide, erect, brace, maintain, and remove forms, shoring, and falsework required for the proper casting of concrete.
materials: Form panels, studs, walers, braces, ties, and supports suitable for concrete placement
execution: Construct forms to the required lines, grades, dimensions, and tolerances
Provide adequate bracing to maintain alignment
Apply form release agent properly
Remove forms only after concrete has gained sufficient strength
testing: Inspection of dimensions, alignment, tightness, and support condition before concreting
clauses.measurement: Measure by square meter of form contact area or as indicated in the BOQ.
clauses.payment: Payment shall include form materials, erection, bracing, removal, cleaning, labor, and incidentals.
special_notes: Sequence of stripping must not impair structural safety or finish quality.

title: Concrete Hollow Block Masonry
reference: DPWH-style masonry provisions, approved architectural/structural details, and building code requirements.

clauses.scope: Provide concrete hollow block walls complete with mortar, reinforcement, grout, and accessories as shown on the plans.
submittals: CHB product data and test report when required
materials: Concrete hollow blocks of approved size and strength
Mortar materials
Reinforcing bars and grout where indicated
execution: Lay blocks true to line, level, and plumb
Provide reinforcement, dowels, and grouting as shown
Maintain uniform joints
Protect fresh masonry from damage and excessive drying
testing: Inspection of plumbness, alignment, joints, and grout filling
clauses.measurement: Measure by square meter, cubic meter, or BOQ pay item as applicable.
clauses.payment: Payment shall include blocks, mortar, grout, reinforcement, labor, scaffolding, and incidentals.
special_notes: Coordinate wall openings, sleeves, and embedded items before block laying.

title: Plastering Works
reference: DPWH-style plastering provisions and approved architectural finish schedules.

clauses.scope: Prepare substrate and apply plaster finish to the surfaces indicated on the plans.
submittals: Material data for plaster mix and additives when used
materials: Cement, sand, water, and approved accessories
Bonding agent only when allowed
execution: Clean and prepare substrate
Apply plaster to the specified thickness and texture
Finish surfaces straight, true, and free from hollowness
Cure plaster adequately
testing: Inspection of adhesion, finish quality, thickness, and alignment
clauses.measurement: Measure by square meter of accepted plastered surface.
clauses.payment: Payment shall include surface preparation, plaster application, curing, labor, and incidentals.
special_notes: Repair cracks, hollowness, and defective work before painting or succeeding finishes.

title: Painting Works
reference: DPWH-style painting provisions and approved finish schedule.

clauses.scope: Prepare surfaces and apply the specified paint system complete with primer, putty, intermediate coat, and finish coat as required.
materials: Approved primer, putty, and finish coat compatible with the substrate
Solvents and accessories recommended by the manufacturer
execution: Clean, dry, patch, and sand surfaces before painting
Apply number of coats necessary to achieve uniform finish
Observe drying time between coats
Protect adjacent surfaces from paint splatter
testing: Inspection of finish uniformity, adhesion, color consistency, and coverage
clauses.measurement: Measure by square meter or by applicable BOQ pay item.
clauses.payment: Payment shall include surface preparation, paint application, protection, labor, tools, and incidentals.
special_notes: Do not apply paint on damp or contaminated surfaces.

title: Roofing and Roof Drainage
reference: DPWH-style roofing provisions, approved roof layout, and manufacturer recommendations.

clauses.scope: Provide roofing sheets, flashings, gutters, downspouts, sealants, and accessories required for a complete and watertight roofing system.
references: Approved roof framing and roofing layout
materials: Roofing sheets of approved thickness and profile
Fasteners, sealants, flashings, gutters, and downspouts compatible with roofing materials
execution: Verify support alignment and roof slope before installation
Install sheets with proper laps and fastening arrangement
Provide complete flashing and drainage details
Ensure watertightness at penetrations and edges
testing: Inspection of alignment, gauge, fastening, and watertightness
clauses.measurement: Measure by square meter, linear meter, set, or BOQ pay item.
clauses.payment: Payment shall include materials, accessories, installation, sealants, labor, and incidentals.
special_notes: Coordinate insulation, ridge rolls, and eave details where specified.

title: Plumbing and Sanitary Piping
reference: Philippine plumbing practice, DPWH-style utility installation provisions, approved plumbing plans, and applicable code requirements.

clauses.scope: Provide pipes, fittings, valves, hangers, supports, fixtures, and testing for water supply, sanitary, vent, and drainage systems complete in place.
references: Manufacturer recommendations for pipe joining systems
submittals: Product data for pipes and fittings
Testing plan for pressure and leak tests
materials: Pipes and fittings of specified type, size, and pressure/class rating
Supports, hangers, cleanouts, traps, valves, and accessories
execution: Install piping true to line and grade
Provide sleeves, supports, and cleanouts where required
Coordinate wall and slab penetrations
Test piping before concealment and turnover
testing: Inspection of slope, supports, and fixture installation
clauses.measurement: Measure by linear meter, set, fixture unit, or BOQ pay item as applicable.
clauses.payment: Payment shall include pipes, fittings, valves, testing, supports, labor, and incidentals.
special_notes: Coordinate with civil works for underground utilities and manholes.

title: Electrical Works
reference: Philippine Electrical Code, approved electrical plans, and DPWH-style utility installation provisions.

clauses.scope: Provide conduits, boxes, wires, cables, devices, fixtures, panels, grounding, supports, and testing for complete electrical and low-current systems as indicated on the plans.
references: Approved electrical plans and single-line diagram
Applicable provisions of the Philippine Electrical Code
materials: Wires and cables of specified insulation and size
Conduits, fittings, boxes, and supports
Switches, receptacles, lighting fixtures, breakers, panels, and grounding materials
execution: Install raceways neatly and in coordination with other trades
Pull conductors after conduits are complete and clean
Identify circuits and equipment
Test systems before energization and turnover
clauses.measurement: Measure by linear meter, set, lot, or BOQ pay item as applicable.
clauses.payment: Payment shall include materials, installation, supports, labels, testing, labor, and incidentals.
special_notes: Low-current systems such as FDAS, CCTV, voice, and data may require additional shop drawings and specialist coordination.

title: Air Conditioning and Ventilation
reference: Approved mechanical plans, manufacturer recommendations, and project mechanical requirements.

clauses.scope: Provide air-conditioning and ventilation equipment, refrigerant piping, condensate drains, ducting, supports, controls, testing, and commissioning complete in place.
materials: Equipment and accessories of specified capacity and rating
Ducts, dampers, insulation, supports, refrigerant piping, and controls
execution: Install equipment level and secure
Coordinate sleeves, openings, and supports
Install piping and ducting without interference
Provide proper condensate drainage
Perform start-up and commissioning
testing: Testing, adjusting, and balancing where applicable
clauses.measurement: Measure by set, linear meter, square meter, lot, or BOQ pay item as applicable.
clauses.payment: Payment shall include equipment, accessories, installation, testing, commissioning, labor, and incidentals.
special_notes: Coordinate electrical provisions, breaker sizing, and condensate disposal requirements.
